title: Get a Grip — 2-month-in-Austin reset (Nov 24 2025)
html:
TL;DR

  • Two-months-in-Austin total-reset doc Yahir writes to himself. Opening: "I've lived in Austin for 2 months and I still feel like I haven't done shit. I feel like I am a total loser outsider." — direct continuation of the Sep 27 isolation note valley.
  • Five tracks Yahir pulls into one doc: physique, business push, money reset, friends, GymBro Health/Brotein go-or-pull-the-plug. First time these are forced into one decision matrix.
  • TrueInsights named as the ticket out: "Right now your ticket out of this is TrueInsights, get it done. Keep going, get hacky, think outside of the box." Same week as the AI search optimization / AEO agency push that becomes the GEO AI AAS Agency doc.
  • Money-reset plan = sell-everything: car ($4500) + dad's Ryker/RV ($5000) + Grandpa Eddie's boat ($1500, commission) + take-out-a-student-loan = ~$11k cash to deploy. Macro thesis: "something big is coming, you can feel it… stocks, buying buildings, other alt assets… these only come every once in a true blue moon."
  • Brotein go-or-pull-the-plug ultimatum: "GymBro Health: Double Users by Jan 31st or be pull plug." Cofounder friction with Cam crystallized in print: "camera has been making some midd ass content." Marketing tactic shift: AI-video pipeline (idea → frame via Nano Banana → video model), women-in-videos, frat/gym partnerships, Reddit push, lifetime deal, paywall revamp.
  • Cohabitation question still live for Emily: "I want to know if Emily should live with me, or if I will continue to have shame in how I live." Direct callback to the Aug 14 letter.

Key beats

  • Friend-acquisition tactic list — pickle ball crew, host an event (cigarette-smoking event?), run/sprint club, Elle Beecher morning walking group, get a better job, ATX Lift gym homies. Yahir's first explicit checklist for engineered serendipity in a new city.
  • Anti-busy-theater note: "Don't be retarded, you know the law of diminishing returns, but push in a manner that grows… don't be busy for the sake of appearances. This is evil." — companion to disconnected from outcome.
  • Tactic note he flags as the meta: "truly hacky SHIT IRL this may be the meta" — invocation of do things that don't scale.
  • Self-correction on friends: "I have maybe built this notion that when I find true friends a lot of my problems will be solved. But this isn't true." Earned wisdom about the friend-acquisition mythology.

Privacy

  • Elle Beecher — single-mention named person (a public morning walking group lead, presumably), queued to Potential Entities; do not stub.
  • Talia, Dudley House (recurring from 2025 09 20 on Austin).
  • Family-financial figures present (sell-the-Ryker etc.) but already vault-ambient; no account numbers.

Relations

  • brotein — the go-or-pull-the-plug ultimatum
  • cam jipp — cofounder friction crystallizes
  • ai search optimization — TrueInsights sits inside this category
  • 2025 09 12 Grandpa Eddie Boat — the boat folded into the sell-everything plan
  • 2025 09 20 on Austin — week-1 arrival; this is the 9-weeks-later return-to-strategy
  • 2025 08 14 Emily — cohabitation question continues
  • 2025 12 30 GEO AI AAS Agency — TrueInsights / agency builds out 5 weeks later
  • do things that dont scale
  • the austin thesis · founder loneliness 2022 2026
